summary: Build a modern, mobile-first, responsive marketing website/landing page for the FinPocket offline privacy-focused personal finance app, including Home, Features, About, Privacy Policy, and FAQ pages with specified sections and content.
architectural_notes: Mobile-first, responsive, clean minimal modern startup-style layout
Soft blue/green/white theme with clean fonts
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- FinPocket app mockup placeholder illustration (finpocket-mockup.dim_1200x900.png)
- Simple line icon for “Quick income and expense entry” (icon-quick-entry.dim_256x256.png)
- Simple line icon for “Custom categories” (icon-categories.dim_256x256.png)
- Simple line icon for “Monthly dashboard and summaries” (icon-dashboard.dim_256x256.png)
- Simple line icon for “Local device storage” (icon-local-storage.dim_256x256.png)
- Simple line icon for “First-time guided walkthrough” (icon-walkthrough.dim_256x256.png)

existing_features.title: Implement a mobile-first, responsive marketing website for the FinPocket mobile application with the following pages and routes: Home, Features, About, Privacy Policy, and FAQ.

Build the Home page as an app landing page with these sections and exact user-facing copy: (1) Hero: Title “FinPocket – Your Money. Your Device. Your Privacy.”; Subtitle “Track your income and expenses easily with a fast, offline, and secure personal finance app.”; CTA button labeled “Download (Coming Soon)”; include an app mockup placeholder image. (2) Why FinPocket bullets: “100% Private (No login, no cloud)”, “Works Offline”, “Fast and Simple”, “No Ads, No Tracking”. (3) Core Features bullets: “Quick income and expense entry”, “Custom categories”, “Monthly dashboard and summaries”, “Local device storage”, “First-time guided walkthrough”. (4) How It Works steps: “Step 1: Install the app”, “Step 2: Add your income and expenses”, “Step 3: View insights and manage your money”. (5) Privacy Highlight: “Your financial data never leaves your device.” (6) Future Features bullets: “Budget planning”, “Backup and restore”, “Export reports”, “App lock / PIN protection”. (7) Call to Action: “Download FinPocket – Coming Soon”.

Create the Features page that explains all core features in detail using simple icons and short descriptions for each feature: Quick income and expense entry, Custom categories, Monthly dashboard and summaries, Local device storage, First-time guided walkthrough.

Create the About page with the provided positioning and mission copy: “FinPocket was built to provide a simple, secure, and private way to manage personal finances. The mission is to give users full control of their financial data without complexity or tracking.”
Create the Privacy Policy page listing these statements clearly: No data collection; No account required; No cloud storage; All data stored locally on the user’s device; No third-party sharing.

Create the FAQ page with the provided Q&A items: “Do I need an account? No.”, “Does it work offline? Yes.”, “Is my data safe? Yes, stored locally.”, “Is the app free? Yes, basic features are free.”, “Are there ads? No.”
Add a site-wide footer that appears on every page with links to Home, Features, About, Privacy, and FAQ; include copyright text “© 2026 FinPocket”; and include a contact email placeholder.

Apply the requested website style across all pages: clean, minimal, modern, professional startup-style layout; mobile-first responsive design; soft blue/green/white color theme; clean, modern fonts; fast loading.
Make the site SEO-friendly by using semantic HTML structure (headers, sections), per-page document titles, and appropriate meta descriptions matching each page’s content.
Add the required static image assets (generated) to the frontend and render them in the UI: the hero app mockup placeholder image and a consistent set of simple feature icons.

new_feature_requests.summary: Create FinPocket website with pages: Home, Features, About, Privacy Policy, FAQ
Implement Home page sections (Hero with CTA, Why FinPocket, Core Features, How It Works, Privacy Highlight, Future Features, CTA)
Create Features page with icons and detailed descriptions of core features
Create About page with mission/positioning copy for FinPocket
Create Privacy Policy page stating no data collection, no account, no cloud, local-only storage, no third-party sharing
Create FAQ page with provided Q&A (account, offline, safety, free, ads)
Add site-wide footer with nav links, © 2026 FinPocket, and contact email placeholder
